lagged_player_source.name: FiveThirtyEight NBA RAPTOR
lagged_player_source.allowed_join: A game may use only a player's aggregate from a fully completed prior season.

cohort.include: Every row with a unique game identity, two interior pregame probabilities, and a non-tied final score.
cohort.orientation: Use source team1 as the listed team and create an exact side swap only for model training and symmetry checks.

inputs.baseline: The source-published team1 pregame probability; do not relabel it as basic Elo.
allowed: source pregame probability and its log odds
rest, back-to-back, and seven-day load from strictly earlier scheduled dates
rolling team results and schedule strength from strictly earlier dates
completed-prior-season CC-BY RAPTOR aggregates when coverage and joins are audited
forbidden: unlicensed lineups, injuries, box scores, or NBA.com-derived data

evaluation.season_gate: Positive baseline-relative log score and positive one-sided 95% seven-day calendar-block bootstrap lower bound in each untouched test season.

limitations: Dates are not exact tipoff or publication timestamps.
The source probability is a published FiveThirtyEight forecast, not guaranteed to be basic Elo.
Historical outcomes may occur in model pretraining, so this remains a contamination-prone diagnostic.
This open lane does not satisfy the licensed lineup, injury, exact-travel, or prospective-season requirements.
